Change 3: Replace:
  if p == "deathcause":
              return f"{subj} died of {obj}"
          if p == "nationality" or p == "stateoforigin":

with:
  if p == "deathcause":
              return f"{subj} died of {obj}"
          if p == "nationality":
              return f"{subj} has {obj} nationality"
          if p == "stateoforigin":
              return f"{subj} is from {obj}"
          if p == "almamater":
              return f"{subj} studied at {obj}"
          if p == "doctoralstudent":
              return f"{subj} supervised {obj}"
          # Fallback generic wording - use "has" for unknown predicates
          return f"{subj} has {pred} of {obj}"
